rdf:Description.dc:description: VH failure-envelope evolution under progressive scour. Eleven envelopes (S = 0 to 5 m in 0.5 m steps) overlaid on a single (V, H) plane. Intact and fully-scoured envelopes highlighted; intermediate scours dashed. Scour arrow visualises the envelope shrinkage direction.
